meta.title: Home | Eagle Logistics & Express Services
meta.description: Eagle Logistics, Estd 2010 - discounted international logistics from India to USA, UK, EU, Middle East and Far East. Doorstep pickup, tracked delivery, domestic and international courier.

hero.promo: Your Gift or Parcel to abroad at most economical price : Just 567*/Kg

intro.title: Eagle Logistics & Express Services
intro.body: We, Eagle Logistics, Estd in 2010 provide a very discounted international logistics. We've got some unbelievably low prices for sending international parcels from India to USA, UK or any other destinations in European Unions, Middle east or far east. We arrange your parcel collected from your door step. Or drop it off at a local pickup point and the parcel will be delivered by our reliable and tracked logistics service which can save you considerable amounts when sending parcels overseas. We specialize in local, national and international courier. We employ the most stringent safety measures. With us there is no chance of loss, pilferage or damage to your package. Besides we are one of the few courier companies that provide international door-to door cargo. So when you think reliability, think Eagle logistics & Express services.

mission.title: Our Mission
items: Let us be the link between you and your loved ones
To track and record all customer shipments to abroad
Have dedicated and passionate staff working for you
Give you, the customer, transparency throughout the delivery process
Give you, the customer, the best possible customer service experience

serviceCards.title: Domestic
serviceCards.body: Your time sensitive Documents / Non documents are delivered next day in all Metros/Major cities & Towns on priority basis

serviceCards.title: International
serviceCards.body: All documents / Non-documents are delivered worldwide at most economical rates. The chosen modes of operational connectivity gives us a cutting edge for faster services as per the requirements of the customers.

items.text: Track your parcel from collection to delivery
Get quotes in seconds for international shipping
Add protection cover to the parcel if required
Easy to fill out customs documents, built into the booking process
Choice of having the parcel collected from home / work / drop it off locally

items.quote: Me and my family are very much impressed with the awesome service by Eagle Logistics.

items.title: Air Cargo
items.summary: Fast air logistics with economical pricing and multimodal reach across India.

items.title: Sea Cargo
items.summary: Reliable FCL and LCL sea freight with worldwide shipping networks.

items.title: Surface Cargo
items.summary: Careful road transport with reliable, on-time domestic surface delivery.
